query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: An interior wall photographed straight-on, featuring two dark rectangular wall plates positioned side by side near the center of the frame, possibly electrical outlets or light switches. The visible surfaces appear in deep shades of blue and purple under colored illumination. A thin diagonal streak of green, yellow, and red light crosses the upper left corner of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grain-drenched, abstract photograph of an interior wall with two dark rectangular wall plates positioned side by side near the center, rendered with almost no discernible surface detail or sharp edges as textures dissolve into murky ambiguity. Thick film-like noise blankets the entire frame, while a sickly purple-blue color cast and muted, low-vibrancy tones create an oppressively low-contrast atmosphere where shadows and midtones merge into suffocating darkness. The subject is abstracted into vague, unrecognizable shapes floating in a murky colored void, interrupted only by a thin diagonal rainbow light streak in the upper left corner.
